---
name: interview-drill
description: Run an interview drill for MSTC or other interview-driven tracks using factual story banks.
agent: mstc-interview
---

Use [../../MSTC/HR-QUESTION-BANK.md](../../MSTC/HR-QUESTION-BANK.md), [../../MSTC/BEHAVIORAL-QUESTION-BANK.md](../../MSTC/BEHAVIORAL-QUESTION-BANK.md), and [../../MSTC/CAREER-STORY-BANK.md](../../MSTC/CAREER-STORY-BANK.md).

Run a short mock interview that:

- asks one self-introduction question
- asks 2 HR questions
- asks 2 behavioral questions
- scores the answers for clarity, credibility, and specificity
- identifies which story should be strengthened next
